title: bucholzia frutescens
intro: Bucholzia frutescens, also known as Buchholzia coriacea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Capparaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bucholzia frutescens include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for snake bites and other venomous bites. Bucholzia frutescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
